assertions.title: Multi-language environment support via configurable Docker images

steps.observed: All 8 tests passed: default mappings, custom overrides, fallback, case-insensitive lookup

steps.action: TestDockerRunnerLanguageImageSelection: 8 tests verify DockerRunner uses correct image per language
steps.expected: DockerRunner selects correct image based on task language
steps.observed: All 8 tests passed: runner construction, create_from_task factory, custom overrides, network_access passthrough

assertions.details: LanguageImageConfig provides per-language Docker image mapping with defaults for python, r, typescript. DockerRunner.create_from_task() factory method selects image based on task.language field. Custom overrides and fallback images are supported. Case-insensitive language lookup works correctly.

assertions.title: Volume mount management for workspace isolation

steps.expected: Each call creates a unique workspace volume
steps.observed: 3 unique volume names created and verified

steps.expected: Each concurrent task gets a different workspace volume
steps.observed: All 5 threads produced unique volume names

steps.expected: File written in task-1 workspace not visible in task-2 workspace
steps.observed: task-2's cat command returns 'file not found' — isolation confirmed

assertions.details: Each prepare() call creates a unique Docker volume with a unique name. Concurrent tasks using threads each get their own isolated workspace. Real Docker integration test confirmed file leakage does not occur between workspaces.

assertions.title: Environment preparation installs task dependencies

steps.observed: EnvironmentSetupError raised with correct error_category, is_prepared=False
Correct exception raised with proper error_category and message

assertions.details: BaseEnvironment.prepare(task) executes setup_command before agent runs. If setup fails, EnvironmentSetupError is raised with error_category=ENVIRONMENT_ERROR. The agent is never called (prepare fails before execute). Cleanup is performed on setup failure (container removed). Task ID is included in error message for debugging.

assertions.title: Network access control per environment

steps.observed: Verified network_mode='none' in create call kwargs
Verified network_mode is None in create call kwargs
wget succeeded, 'network ok' in stdout or exit_code==0

assertions.details: Default network_access=False produces --network=none on container creation. When network_access=True, no network_mode restriction is applied (default bridge). Real Docker integration tests confirmed: wget to example.com fails with network disabled, succeeds with network enabled.

assertions.title: Environment supports custom working directory

steps.observed: Verified working_dir='/app/src' in create call kwargs

assertions.details: DockerRunner accepts a working_dir parameter (default: /workspace). The working_dir is passed to containers.create(). Real Docker integration test confirmed that commands execute from the specified directory (pwd output matches configured working_dir).

assertions.title: Environment health check returns structured diagnostics

steps.expected: Returns model with docker_available, images_ready, disk_free_gb
steps.observed: All three attributes present on returned model

steps.expected: disk_free_gb is float in expected range
images_ready reports correctly for available image
Model serializes to JSON with required fields

assertions.details: env.health_check() returns a structured EnvironmentHealth Pydantic model with docker_available (bool), images_ready (bool), and disk_free_gb (float). Docker availability is checked by pinging the daemon. Disk space is calculated from shutil.disk_usage. Image readiness checks if the configured image exists locally. The model serializes to JSON correctly. Both DockerRunner and LocalRunner support health_check.

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-ENV-01, VAL-ENV-02, VAL-ENV-03, VAL-ENV-04, VAL-ENV-06, VAL-ENV-08) using pytest with 47 tests total. All 47 tests passed (16 for VAL-ENV-01, 3 for VAL-ENV-02, 6 for VAL-ENV-03, 8 for VAL-ENV-04, 5 for VAL-ENV-06, 9 for VAL-ENV-08). Test coverage includes: language-to-image mapping, workspace isolation (including concurrent threads and real Docker), setup command execution/failure with ENVIRONMENT_ERROR, network access control (--network=none vs enabled, verified with real wget), custom working directory (verified with pwd in real container), and health check structured output. All assertions PASS.
